blended.narrative: Marble Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,128 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
